text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while relaxing in my room, I receive an
email from Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Attention, all trainers! I will soon make an
announcement with significant implications for
your future."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Be sure not to miss it! From Tracen Academy
Director Akikawa."

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Greetings! Members of the press, thank you all
for coming! Listen well! I have gathered you here
today for an important announ—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Um, Director! You have to stand on the box, or
they won't be able to see you!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Hm, right you are! Apologies, apologies!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
All right, this seems okay. Well, then, from the
top!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Listen well! I, the director of Tracen Academy,
hereby announce...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: The establishment of a new race, the URA Finale!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Murmur, murmur, murmur...

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
"The URA Finale"?! They're creating an entirely
new race?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa! I'm Otonashi of Twinkle
Monthly. May I ask you a question?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Permissible! What is it, Miss Otonashi?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Now then...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Can you give us some insight into the thought
process behind this decision?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Excellent question! I'm glad you asked!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
In short, the URA Finale is an event that allows
every Umamusume to seek a chance at glory!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
It will be an event where any and all Umamusume
can compete! Respect! Honor! Recognition! It will
all be theirs for the taking!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: A chance at glory... for all Umamusume?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Hehe, hehehe... Hehehehehe!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! Now this is getting interesting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sudden announcement of the URA Finale
rocks the racing world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Immediately afterward, an information session is
held for everyone at Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time I make it to the gymnasium, it's
already buzzing with trainers and Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
"The URA Finale," huh... Can they really just make
up a whole new race like that?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
I wonder... I know the director's a big deal, but
she's still a child at the end of the day.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
The old director ran the academy like clockwork,
but that doesn't mean her daughter knows what
she's—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Excuse me for interrupting.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There will be time for questions after the
director's address. If you have any concerns, you
may bring them up then.

text_block_list.name: Trainers
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Tazuna! E-excuse us! We didn't mean to be
rude!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging by the mood in the room, there's still a
lot of confusion and uncertainty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The atmosphere persists as Director Akikawa's
URA Finale briefing session finally begins.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Welcome! I'm sure that many of you must have
been taken aback by this sudden announcement.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However! I ask that you hear me out as I explain
the significance of the URA Finale!

text_block_list.name: Attendees
text_block_list.text: Significance? What does she mean?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd glances at one another, and a hum of
whispers fills the hall. With perfect timing,
Director Akikawa resumes her address.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: My beloved students and trainers!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Tell me, have you ever known regret?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
"I want to win the Arima Kinen!" "I want to
conquer the Derby!" "I want to be the strongest
Umamusume!"

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Have you ever had dreams that you couldn't
realize because the distance or the track surface
just wasn't right for you?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Have you ever ground your teeth in chagrin as
you thought, "I'm better than this!"?! Trainers,
have you not had similar regrets?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Heed me! I aim to create a world where all
Umamusume who aspire to race can shine!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And Umamusume runners shine the brightest
when their wills clash! As they battle it out for the
top spot, the heat of battle shall forge and polish
our racers until their brilliance is blinding!
Blinding, I say!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
In summary! I wish to prepare a race that will
serve as a stage for all Umamusume to show their
full potential!

text_block_list.name: Attendees
text_block_list.text: Director...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Currently, each G1 race has a designated
distance and track type, limiting the runners who
can join that particular race.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: However!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Behold! The URA Finale will feature all distances
and tracks!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All distances!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All tracks?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Just like in the Arima Kinen and the Takarazuka
Kinen, participating racers will be selected by fan
vote!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Ergo, only Umamusume who have won many fans
through their performance in the Twinkle
Series—the star Umamusume—may take part!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Racers! I ask of you! Will you take this chance to
show your true strength?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Will you aim for the top and seize the title of
Finale Champion?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Trainers! I ask of you! Will you take this chance to
push your trainees to their limits?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Will you see your trainee crowned the first-ever
winner of the URA Finale?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Three years from now, in the new year, you will
have your chance! Come! Gather your fans and
become superstars!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Encouragement! Excitement! I look forward to
your success!

text_block_list.name: Attendees
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The atmosphere in the gymnasium shifts
completely as the doubts previously held by the
audience melt away and are replaced with
raucous applause.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, the birth of a new year-end race,
the URA Finale, is announced!
